passed_checks.check_name: Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
code_block:
provider "aws" {
  access_key                  = "test"
  secret_key                  = "test"
  region                      = "us-east-1"
  s3_use_path_style           = true
  skip_credentials_validation = true
  skip_metadata_api_check     = true
  skip_requesting_account_id  = true
}

Ensure Lambda Runtime is not deprecated
code_block:
resource "aws_lambda_function" "side" {
  filename         = data.archive_file.handler.output_path
  function_name    = "${var.environment_name}-fn"
  role             = aws_iam_role.lambda_role.arn
  handler          = "handler.handler"
  runtime          = "python3.12"
  source_code_hash = data.archive_file.handler.output_base64sha256

  tags = local.tags
}
